headline: History of 3M & its stock: Company timeline, facts & milestones
summary: It was the misfire that launched the Boise Blitz. Back in 1968, Spencer Silver, a scientist for 3M (MMM), was working on a super-strong aerospace adhesive. Instead, however, he ended up with a substance that stuck to surfaces lightly, could be peeled off easily, and could be reused multiple times ...
